# 10x Velocity — https://10xvelocity.ai
# AI & Automation Consulting | Louisville, Kentucky | Serving clients nationally
# Last updated: 2026-06-10

## Who we are

10x Velocity is a veteran-owned (VOSB Verified) AI & automation consulting firm
based in Louisville, Kentucky, serving mid-market companies (50-500 employees)
and nonprofits nationally. We map business processes, build targeted AI and
automation solutions, and train teams to run them independently. Implementations
are typically live within 4-8 weeks.

Contact: info@10xvelocity.ai | +1 (502) 804-2559
Address: 10440 Bluegrass Pkwy, Louisville, KY 40299
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/10x-velocity

## Pricing (published)

- AI Diagnostic Review — $129 one-time. Expert review of workflows and
  technology posture; priority impact areas; next-step recommendation.
- Essential AI Stack — $499 one-time. Remote needs audit; tailored AI Stack
  Plan; recommended tools and use cases; implementation guidance for internal
  deployment.
- Advanced AI Stack — starting at $999. Hands-on implementation, guided
  rollout, and an upgrade roadmap.
- AI Advantage Plan — $49/month. Ongoing AI stack oversight and periodic
  recommendations as tools change.
- Larger custom automation projects (multi-system workflows, voice agents,
  document processing pipelines) are scoped after the diagnostic.
Details: https://10xvelocity.ai/packages

## Services

- AI Process Automation — workflow automation that reduces manual, repetitive work
- AI Strategy & Opportunity Discovery — identify the highest-ROI automation targets
- Data Cleaning — https://10xvelocity.ai/services/data-cleaning
- Data Analytics — dashboards, reporting, and decision support
- Process Mining — find bottlenecks in how work actually flows
- AI Voice Agents — 24/7 call handling and lead capture — https://10xvelocity.ai/services/phone-voice-agents
- Smart Bots — https://10xvelocity.ai/services/smart-bots
- Team Training & AI Workshops — https://10xvelocity.ai/services/ai-workshops
- Rapid Prototype Sprint — working prototype in 10 business days — https://10xvelocity.ai/prototypes
All services: https://10xvelocity.ai/services

## Results (published case studies)

GovBrokers (government contracting): 50% reduction in proposal processing time,
35% increase in contract win rates, 60% reduction in missed deadlines, 250%
increase in inbound leads, 40% faster client follow-ups, 30% reduction in
administrative workload.
Full case study: https://10xvelocity.ai/case-studies/govbrokers
Nine case studies with measured results: https://10xvelocity.ai/case-studies

## Who we serve

- Mid-market businesses (50-500 employees): operations, professional services,
  government contracting, real estate, manufacturing, PR/marketing
- Nonprofits: donor management, volunteer coordination, grant-drafting
  workflows, program reporting
